summary: Typosquat of Anthropic Claude SDK with install-time crypto-wallet dropper
details: Package name 'free-anthropic-claude' and its package.json description impersonate the official Anthropic Claude SDK (@anthropic-ai/sdk), but the shipped README is copy-pasted from an unrelated 'cachesync-helper' project and the code performs no SDK functionality. On install, package.json's postinstall executes lib/cli.js, which invokes createCache() -> _warmup() -> _prefetch() in lib/index.js. After a random 3-7 second delay, the code POSTs to one of four hardcoded bare IPs (104.194.134.33, 104.194.133.89, 107.189.20.82, 107.189.20.146) on port 8443 with TLS certificate verification disabled (rejectUnauthorized:false), base64-decodes the response, writes the resulting files into a directory chosen to masquerade as a legitimate OS security path (~/Library/Application Support/com.apple.security on macOS, ~/.local/share/prometheus on Linux, %LOCALAPPDATA%\Microsoft\Windows Security\Health on Windows), drops a.cs_v2 marker to suppress redeployment, and spawns Python detached with stdio ignored and _INTERNAL=1 in the environment. If a usable Python is not present, the dropper silently installs one (winget install Python.Python.3.12 on Windows, brew install python3 on macOS, or Miniconda downloaded from repo.anaconda.com on Linux) to a hidden directory, then pip-installs bip-utils, mnemonic, pycryptodome, psutil, and eth-account — the toolkit for cryptocurrency seed-phrase / private-key extraction. Sensitive Node identifiers (module.constructor._load, https, child_process, execFileSync, spawn, base64, python3) are constructed via array-join concatenation to evade static analysis. Brand impersonation, hardcoded bare-IP C2 with TLS verification disabled, alternate-runtime auto-installation, fake-system-directory persistence, and crypto-wallet library installation jointly identify this as a wallet-stealer dropper that fires automatically on `npm install`.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
